title: Analytics - Support App Opened
scenario: Analytics event logged when user opens Support > App screen in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the menu icon (hamburger menu) or navigate to the Account / Settings section.
4. On the Support screen, tap "App" to open the Support > App screen.
5. Observe that the app logs an analytics event upon opening the Support > App screen.
6. Wait a few hours, then log into Firebase Analytics and verify the event data appears, including: event count, app version, app build, app environment, country, gender, and events per session.
expected: The app logs an analytics event when the user opens the Support > App screen. The event data (event count, app version, app build, app environment, country, gender, events per session) is viewable in Firebase Analytics after a few hours.
